reviews.review_description: So this game is not scary at all and it’s has this fuzzy stuff in the levels the make impossible to see and the moderation sucks to get mod dm the owner and say I’ll give you 10$ for mod and he’ll give you it and he’s super rude sometimes unless you buy a bundle also I’ve wrote a 1 star before and I got banned he said why not banned you if you don’t like it

this game is the most horrible game ive ever seen... This game is so bad that my eyes burn when i open the game that i uninstalled it. Owner is rude and he's a horrible person and no one likes this game or him.

developer_response.body: We are extremely sorry you had a bad experience with the game. If you would like to e offer suggestions with the game, join the discord! We offer moderation suggestions and more! https://discord.gg/vRZd6Aj6qw

reviews.review_description:
Ive played this game for a while and it has really good potential to be the next best game!

Good job making this game!
I hope to keep playing in the future!!!
I’m friends with the owner of this game and he is super nice and puts a lit of times into this game I like it and I hope you like it to
I was wrong about the owner, Please do not listen to my other review I made as I had no idea what was happening so please do not listen

reviews.review_title: The game that can be BIG
reviews.review_description: This game finally released and I have been trying the early versions, this is a great game that hopefully gets more features in the future
I love the game it is so good and fun for all ages there are cosmetics there’s levels and pvp and more it so fun and you never get bored
This game is amazing, it is my new favorite and I can't wait for new levels to come out
The game is great very well made! Definitely recommend to others.
I like this game it has very cool stuff ffff and good staff.

This game is really good and I recommend it
It’s very fun so play now it’s free 🔫
This game has so much cool stuff to offer!!
